creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Tomoya Tabuchi,

thank you for the patch.
The special case for rubygem-updates is, that you need to check all software depending on them. 

I'm currently testing your patch and will check, if the following ports will still work after the update:
- irc/rubygem-cogbot
- net/rubygem-stompserver
- net/rubygem-tweetstream
- www/rubygem-thin

Greetings,
Torsten
